data.content: Plan review approved. Current displayBeatLabel() returns the first alias verbatim, so hierarchical aliases like knots-562b.1 would currently leak the project prefix. The proposed change is correctly scoped to src/lib/beat-display.ts by stripping prefixes only for dotted hierarchical aliases while leaving human-friendly aliases unchanged. Proposed tests in src/lib/__tests__/beat-display.test.ts cover the target regression, the unchanged ship-views case, and a multi-dot hierarchical alias. No knot invariants are present, and the plan is feasible with low security, performance, and maintainability risk.
